---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for LeIndex
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the pain point or missing capability.

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Use Case

How would you use this feature? What workflow does it improve?

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or examples that help explain the request.
